comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.subtitle: This service module is currently under design and development.
home.heroSubtitle: We stand by you with our innovative R&D and mechanical production capabilities for custom part manufacturing intended for defense, automotive, and industrial sectors.
quote.title: Create a Quote Request
quote.subtitle: Upload your file; specify material, quantity, and urgency. We will get back to you immediately.
quote.fileDesc: Drag and drop or select your drawing files
quote.fileLimits: STEP, DWG, PDF or ZIP format. Max 25MB.
quote.descPlace: Any other details or manufacturing specifics you would like to clarify...
quote.name: Full Name
quote.approveDesc: Please approve the personal data processing terms before submitting your quote request.
quote.kvkkLabel: I have read and accepted the Privacy Policy
quote.successDesc: After reviewing your request, our technical team will verify the drawings. We will contact you shortly with standard pricing and lead times.
sw.heroTitle: Digital Transformation from Production to Delivery
sw.heroSubtitle: Digitize your production processes, reduce costs and time. Modular software solutions managing everything from quotes to delivery.
sw.f1Desc: Upload drawings and get instant cost and pricing in seconds, not hours.
sw.f2Desc: Automatically manage raw material, labor, and overhead calculations from a single dashboard.
sw.f3Desc: Monitor machine efficiency, work order status, and quality results in real time.
sw.f4Desc: Send the generated code directly to the CNC machine, eliminating human errors completely.
sw.demoSubtitle: Upgrade your factory to Industry 4.0 standards with Harveniq Software. Fill out the form to schedule your free demo.
sys.heroTitle: Turnkey Industrial Solutions, From Field to High-Tech
sys.heroSubtitle: We execute secure engineering projects compliant with industrial standards, supporting you from facility setup to final commissioning.
sys.f1Desc: Custom switchgear panel design and wiring with SCADA communication capabilities for industrial plants.
sys.f2Desc: Full PLC/SCADA integration solutions enabling smart production lines.
sys.f3Desc: Flawless mechanical and electrical assembly handled by our highly experienced field teams.
sys.f4Desc: Preventive periodic maintenance and 24/7 rapid response troubleshooting for your entire production line.
sys.tl1Desc: Detailed preliminary field inspection and facility power capacity assessment.
sys.tl2Desc: Engineering and 3D projection of panel layouts and automation network schematics.
sys.tl3Desc: Safe, on-site hardware deployment operated by fully certified personnel.
sys.tl4Desc: Executing thorough load tests and zero-defect system start-ups.
sys.tl5Desc: Providing operational usage training to your factory staff before the official project handover.
sys.formSubtitle: Share the details of your new production line implementation or facility overhaul. Our engineering team will contact you shortly for a site survey.
portal.heroTitle: The Industrial Infrastructure of the Future
portal.heroSubtitle: Harveniq provides integrated engineering solutions in production, software, and industrial facility automation. Make your selection and discover our vision.
portal.cncDesc: High-tolerance precision machining and rapid series production solutions with expert engineering.
portal.swDesc: A modular ERP/MES infrastructure that digitizes your factory processes from quote to delivery.
portal.sysDesc: SCADA-communicative panels, PLC integrations, and turnkey factory setup automation services.
